name: Eggplant Manicotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).
2. Peel the eggplant and slice into 12 pieces, each 1/4-inch thick.
3. Slice from top to bottom. Place slices on a paper towel and sprinkle with salt to allow water to drain.
4. Heat olive oil in a skillet. Cook the eggplant slices until lightly browned, then lay them on a paper towel to let the oil drain.
5. Roll 1-1/2 ounces of ricotta cheese around each slice.
6. Pour tomato sauce over the manicotti and arrange them neatly in rows.
7. Bake at 400 degrees F (200 degrees C) until hot all the way through. Remove the manicotti from the pan and transfer to a serving dish.
Sauce:
1. In a pan, combine the tomato sauce with heavy cream until the sauce is pink.
2. Simmer for 2 or 3 minutes.
3. Pour the sauce over the manicotti and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
